_comment: Driver injection manifest for deploy.ps1 Invoke-DriverInjection.
_comment2: Each key under 'models' must match the normalized WMI model key OR list exact WMI model strings in wmiModels.
_comment3: driverPath is relative to deploy$\drivers\ on pc-deploy.

dell-xps-13-9380.description: Intel RST AHCI/RAID controller for Dell XPS 13 9380 (Cannon Point-LP, 8th gen Whiskey Lake). Covers DEV_9DD7 (Cannon Point-LP SATA RAID). Required when BIOS storage controller is set to RAID/RST mode.
